description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release Linux that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-16.04 environment, checking out the code, initializing submodules, installing Python 3.7 and Qt, building the project with CMake, determining the version and whether it's a beta release, creating an AppImage package, and archiving the full source code. Finally, release the AppImage and source archive as a draft GitHub release, with a prerelease flag based on the version.
